volcenginetexttovideo.description: Generate video from text prompt using VolcEngine Seedance models

model.name: Model
model.tooltip: Seedance model version to use for video generation

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.tooltip: Describe the video content you want to generate

concurrency.name: Concurrency
concurrency.tooltip: Number of parallel tasks (roll mode: same prompt, different seeds)

aspect_ratio.name: Aspect Ratio
aspect_ratio.tooltip: Video aspect ratio. Use 'adaptive' for automatic selection

generate_audio.name: Generate Audio
generate_audio.tooltip: Whether to generate accompanying audio for the video

camera_fixed.name: Fixed Camera
camera_fixed.tooltip: Keep camera position fixed without movement

return_last_frame.name: Return Last Frame
return_last_frame.tooltip: Include the last frame in the output

service_tier.name: Service Tier
service_tier.tooltip: Service level: 'default' for standard, 'flex' for offline/low-cost

watermark.name: Watermark
watermark.tooltip: Whether to add watermark to the generated video

seed.name: Seed
seed.tooltip: Random seed for reproducibility (-1 for random)

max_wait.name: Max Wait (s)
max_wait.tooltip: Maximum seconds to wait for task completion

0.name: Video Frames
0.tooltip: Generated video frames as IMAGE tensor

1.name: Audio
1.tooltip: Generated audio track as AUDIO tensor

2.name: Video Info
2.tooltip: Task result information in JSON format

volcengineimagetovideo.description: Generate video from image(s) using VolcEngine Seedance models. Supports multi-image and reference audio.

model.name: Model
model.tooltip: Seedance model version to use for video generation

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.tooltip: Describe the motion or scene transition (can be left empty)

concurrency.name: Concurrency
concurrency.tooltip: Number of parallel tasks (roll mode: same config, different seeds)

aspect_ratio.name: Aspect Ratio
aspect_ratio.tooltip: Video aspect ratio. Use 'adaptive' for automatic selection

generate_audio.name: Generate Audio
generate_audio.tooltip: Whether to generate accompanying audio for the video

camera_fixed.name: Fixed Camera
camera_fixed.tooltip: Keep camera position fixed without movement

return_last_frame.name: Return Last Frame
return_last_frame.tooltip: Include the last frame in the output

service_tier.name: Service Tier
service_tier.tooltip: Service level: 'default' for standard, 'flex' for offline/low-cost

watermark.name: Watermark
watermark.tooltip: Whether to add watermark to the generated video

reference_audio.name: Reference Audio
reference_audio.tooltip: Optional reference audio for style matching

seed.name: Seed
seed.tooltip: Random seed for reproducibility (-1 for random)

max_wait.name: Max Wait (s)
max_wait.tooltip: Maximum seconds to wait for task completion

0.name: Video Frames
0.tooltip: Generated video frames as IMAGE tensor

1.name: Audio
1.tooltip: Generated audio track as AUDIO tensor

2.name: Video Info
2.tooltip: Task result information in JSON format

volcengineimagegeneration.description: Generate images using VolcEngine Seedream models. Supports text-to-image and image-to-image.

model.name: Model
model.tooltip: Seedream model version to use for image generation

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.tooltip: Describe the image content you want to generate

concurrency.name: Concurrency
concurrency.tooltip: Number of parallel tasks (roll mode: same config, different seeds)

service_tier.name: Service Tier
service_tier.tooltip: Service level: 'default' for standard, 'flex' for offline/low-cost

watermark.name: Watermark
watermark.tooltip: Whether to add watermark to the generated image

reference_image.name: Reference Image
reference_image.tooltip: Optional reference image for image-to-image generation

seed.name: Seed
seed.tooltip: Random seed for reproducibility (-1 for random)

1.name: Generation Info
1.tooltip: Task result information in JSON format
